channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Judges punishing Jan. 6 rioters say they fear more political violence as Election Day nears
item.description: Judges punishing rioters for storming the U.S. Capitol nearly four years ago fear the nation faces more political violence on the cusp of the next presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump microphone cuts out for 20 minutes at Detroit rally
item.description: Trump was in the midst of speaking about his tariff policy at the event on Friday, about to call it “the most beautiful word in the dictionary,” before the microphone went down. Someone handed the former president another microphone to try, but it didn’t work either.
item.dc:creator: Jared Gans, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A failed mic leaves Donald Trump pacing the stage in silence for nearly 20 minutes
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Donald Trump paced his rally stage in silence for nearly 20 minutes Friday night in Detroit after his microphone cut out.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montana GOP candidate who could flip control of Senate nagged by claims he lied about bullet wound
item.description: BILLINGS, Mont. (AP) — A former Park Service ranger said Friday that U.S. Senate hopeful Tim Sheehy of Montana has been lying about a bullet wound that the candidate said came from fighting in Afghanistan — going public with an accusation that has nagged the Republican’s campaign for months.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW BROWN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Home stretch: Harris, Trump hold dueling events, rallies in crucial battleground state
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris and former President Trump held dueling campaign events in battleground Michigan with less than three weeks to go until Election Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News Politics: Crunch time for Harris
item.description: Get the latest updates from the 2024 campaign trail, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate Republicans raise questions after funds for disaster loans exhausted
item.description: A group of GOP senators are pressing the Small Business Administration (SBA) for answers after officials said its disaster loan program exhausted its funds earlier this week in the aftermath of a pair of major hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hotel attracted would-be judges, ambassadors, pardon-seekers, House Democrats say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Judges seeking appointments to the federal bench. Wealthy Republicans hoping for ambassadorships. Criminals who wanted pardons. They were among the big spenders at Donald Trump ’s Washington, D.C., hotel while he was president.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Oregon elections office shuts down phone lines amid false info surrounding Trump, voters' pamphlet
item.description: The Oregon Elections Division is shutting down its phone lines after the system was "overwhelmed" by out-of-state callers responding to false information about why Donald Trump is not in the Oregon Voters' Pamphlet.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Kustura, Fox 5

item.title: Election 2024: How the 'New York Seven' could decide the House
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York voters have much to consider on Election Day. In addition to voting for the next president of the United States, New Yorkers will be asked to decide on a proposed amendment to the state Constitution, a U.S. Senate seat, and House representatives.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Trump couldn't pronounce 'Assyrians.' The community is happy to be in the spotlight
item.description: Assyrian Americans got an influx of attention when former President Donald Trump mangled the word “Assyrian” while giving a shout out at a rally in Arizona.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan J. Cooper, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: GOP lawmaker in hurricane-ravaged Georgia demands emergency session of Congress
item.description: Rep. Buddy Carter is urging Congressional leaders to reconvene lawmakers in Washington, D.C., to deal with funding for disaster victims after the hurricanes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Politics Friday: The 2024 election will determine who presides in Minnesota courtrooms, remember there are judges on your ballot
item.description: There are about 100 races on Minnesota’s election ballots that won’t get that much attention, and they’re all about judgeships. MPR News politics editor and his guests talk about judicial elections and why they’re different here than in other states.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, Matthew Alvarez, and Ellie Roth, MPR News

item.title: Former Minnesota Congressman Rick Nolan dies at age 80
item.description: Former U.S. Rep. Rick Nolan, who represented two of Minnesota’s congressional districts in Washington more than 30 years apart, has died at the age of 80.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff and Dan Kraker, MPR News

item.title: Submit your questions for the JD Vance town hall on NewsNation
item.description: X users can use the hashtag #VanceTownHall to submit questions to JD Vance, moderated by Chris Cuomo.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Judge orders more Jack Smith Trump investigation docs to be made public ahead of election
item.description: The judge in former President Donald Trump's election interference case ordered additional documents about his claim of immunity to be made public before the November elections.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 3 states renew efforts to limit abortion pill access
item.description: The lawsuit was filed in a Texas federal court, roughly four months after the Supreme Court decided against undoing changes to the FDA’s regulations on the abortion pill that expanded access.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, NewsNation

item.title: Trump visits barbershop in the Bronx
item.description: THE BRONX, N.Y. (PIX11) – Former President Donald Trump visited a barbershop in the Bronx on Thursday. Trump stopped by Javiel's Barbershop on Castle Hill Avenue.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: GOP cringes over Trump’s vow to wield military against opponents
item.description: Former President Trump’s incendiary comments about deploying the military and using other powers of the executive branch to pursue his political enemies, including a sitting member of Congress, is putting downballot Republican candidates on the defensive.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: How to watch the Nevada US Senate Debate
item.description: The only debate between Democratic incumbent Sen. Jacky Rosen and Republican challenger Sam Brown will occur on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Harris Fox News interview draws sharp reactions on both sides
item.description: “If she wins, it will be because of that answer … which is ‘I’m not Joe Biden,’” columnist Chris Cillizza noted.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Florida elections officials seek flexibility on voting rules after hurricanes
item.description: Florida's recent hurricanes could make it difficult for voters in affected areas to cast their ballots in the upcoming election unless Gov. Ron DeSantis waives and modifies some rules, county election supervisors said in a letter to state officials.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lyft launches voter transportation initiative
item.description: “Lyft believes transportation access should never be a barrier for any citizen seeking to vote," Lyft Chief Policy Officer Jerry Golden said in the release.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Trump spends big on anti-trans ads for 2024 election
item.description: Trump spends more on ads about transgender women and girls in sports and gender transitions than on Bidenomics, fracking and taxes.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: Man arrested near Trump Coachella rally with gun sues for defamation
item.description: The man arrested near former President Trump’s Coachella, Calif., rally over the weekend sued the Riverside County sheriff for defamation and other claims, saying there were “preposterous allegations” made about the incident possibly being an assassination attempt.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, NewsNation

item.title: Trump focuses on women’s issues in front of all-women audience in Fox News town hall
item.description: The former president took questions on immigration, the economy and abortion in the hour-long town hall in front of a friendly crowd of women in suburban Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota Republican Party sues Hennepin County over election judges list
item.description: A state law requires each county in Minnesota select election judges from lists provided by the Republican and Democratic parties. A lawsuit claims Hennepin County violated state statute by not selecting judges from a GOP list.
item.dc:creator: Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Nevada political parties seek to sway ‘Gen Z’ amid inflation and recovery from an on-campus mass shooting
item.description: Young Democrats and College Republicans at UNLV are campaigning for their respective candidates in the 2024 election, citing issues such as inflation, gun violence, and reproductive freedoms, while the Trump campaign is targeting students through social media and face-to-face meetings.
item.dc:creator: James Schaeffer, KLAS, CBS News
